# Google Drive API v3 Reference

## Service Information

**Base URL:** `https://www.googleapis.com`

**Discovery Document:** `https://www.googleapis.com/discovery/v1/apis/drive/v3/rest`

**Service Endpoint:** `https://www.googleapis.com`

---

## REST Resources and Methods

### v3.about

**Resource:** Get information about the user, Drive, and system capabilities

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/about`
  - **Description:** Retrieves user information, user's Drive details, and system capabilities

### v3.accessproposals

**Resource:** Manage access proposals on files

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/accessproposals/{proposalId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves a specific access proposal by ID

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/accessproposals`
  - **Description:** Lists all access proposals on a file

- **Method:** `resolve`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/accessproposals/{proposalId}:resolve`
  - **Description:** Approves or denies an access proposal

### v3.approvals

**Resource:** Manage file approvals and review workflows

- **Method:** `approve`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals/{approvalId}:approve`
  - **Description:** Approves an approval

- **Method:** `cancel`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals/{approvalId}:cancel`
  - **Description:** Cancels an approval

- **Method:** `comment`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals/{approvalId}:comment`
  - **Description:** Adds a comment to an approval

- **Method:** `decline`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals/{approvalId}:decline`
  - **Description:** Declines an approval

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals/{approvalId}`
  - **Description:** Gets an approval by ID

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals`
  - **Description:** Lists all approvals on a file

- **Method:** `reassign`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals/{approvalId}:reassign`
  - **Description:** Reassigns reviewers on an approval

- **Method:** `start`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/approvals:start`
  - **Description:** Initiates an approval workflow on a file

### v3.apps

**Resource:** Manage installed applications

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/apps/{appId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves details for a specific application

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/apps`
  - **Description:** Lists all applications installed for the user

### v3.changes

**Resource:** Track file and Drive changes

- **Method:** `getStartPageToken`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/changes/startPageToken`
  - **Description:** Obtains the starting page token for listing future changes

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/changes`
  - **Description:** Lists changes for a user or shared drive

- **Method:** `watch`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/changes/watch`
  - **Description:** Subscribes to change notifications for a user

### v3.channels

**Resource:** Manage push notification channels

- **Method:** `stop`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/channels/stop`
  - **Description:** Stops watching resources through a notification channel

### v3.comments

**Resource:** Manage file comments and discussions

- **Method:** `create`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments`
  - **Description:** Creates a new comment on a file

- **Method:** `delete`
  - **Endpoint:** `DELETE /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}`
  - **Description:** Deletes a comment

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves a comment by ID

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments`
  - **Description:** Lists all comments on a file

- **Method:** `update`
  - **Endpoint:** `PATCH /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}`
  - **Description:** Updates a comment with patch semantics

### v3.drives

**Resource:** Manage shared drives

- **Method:** `create`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/drives`
  - **Description:** Creates a new shared drive

- **Method:** `delete`
  - **Endpoint:** `DELETE /drive/v3/drives/{driveId}`
  - **Description:** Permanently deletes a shared drive (requires organizer access)

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/drives/{driveId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves a shared drive's metadata by ID

- **Method:** `hide`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/drives/{driveId}/hide`
  - **Description:** Hides a shared drive from the default view

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/drives`
  - **Description:** Lists all of the user's shared drives

- **Method:** `unhide`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/drives/{driveId}/unhide`
  - **Description:** Restores a hidden shared drive to the default view

- **Method:** `update`
  - **Endpoint:** `PATCH /drive/v3/drives/{driveId}`
  - **Description:** Updates a shared drive's metadata

### v3.files

**Resource:** Manage files and file operations

- **Method:** `copy`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/copy`
  - **Description:** Creates a copy of a file with optional patch updates

- **Method:** `create`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files` or `POST /upload/drive/v3/files`
  - **Description:** Creates a new file

- **Method:** `delete`
  - **Endpoint:** `DELETE /drive/v3/files/{fileId}`
  - **Description:** Permanently deletes a file owned by the user

- **Method:** `download`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/download`
  - **Description:** Downloads file content

- **Method:** `emptyTrash`
  - **Endpoint:** `DELETE /drive/v3/files/trash`
  - **Description:** Permanently deletes all trashed files

- **Method:** `export`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/export`
  - **Description:** Exports a Google Workspace document to requested MIME type

- **Method:** `generateIds`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/generateIds`
  - **Description:** Generates file IDs for use in create or copy requests

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves a file's metadata or content by ID

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files`
  - **Description:** Lists the user's files

- **Method:** `listLabels`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/listLabels`
  - **Description:** Lists all labels applied to a file

- **Method:** `modifyLabels`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/modifyLabels`
  - **Description:** Modifies the set of labels on a file

- **Method:** `update`
  - **Endpoint:** `PATCH /drive/v3/files/{fileId}` or `PATCH /upload/drive/v3/files/{fileId}`
  - **Description:** Updates file metadata, content, or both

- **Method:** `watch`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/watch`
  - **Description:** Subscribes to change notifications for a file

### v3.operations

**Resource:** Monitor long-running operations

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/operations/{name}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves the latest state of a long-running operation

### v3.permissions

**Resource:** Manage file and shared drive permissions

- **Method:** `create`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/permissions`
  - **Description:** Creates a permission for a file or shared drive

- **Method:** `delete`
  - **Endpoint:** `DELETE /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/permissions/{permissionId}`
  - **Description:** Deletes a permission

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/permissions/{permissionId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves a permission by ID

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/permissions`
  - **Description:** Lists all permissions on a file or shared drive

- **Method:** `update`
  - **Endpoint:** `PATCH /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/permissions/{permissionId}`
  - **Description:** Updates a permission with patch semantics

### v3.replies

**Resource:** Manage comment replies

- **Method:** `create`
  - **Endpoint:** `POST /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies`
  - **Description:** Creates a reply to a comment

- **Method:** `delete`
  - **Endpoint:** `DELETE /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies/{replyId}`
  - **Description:** Deletes a reply

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies/{replyId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves a reply by ID

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies`
  - **Description:** Lists all replies to a comment

- **Method:** `update`
  - **Endpoint:** `PATCH /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/comments/{commentId}/replies/{replyId}`
  - **Description:** Updates a reply with patch semantics

### v3.revisions

**Resource:** Manage file revisions and version history

- **Method:** `delete`
  - **Endpoint:** `DELETE /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/revisions/{revisionId}`
  - **Description:** Permanently deletes a file version

- **Method:** `get`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/revisions/{revisionId}`
  - **Description:** Retrieves a revision's metadata or content by ID

- **Method:** `list`
  - **Endpoint:** `GET /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/revisions`
  - **Description:** Lists all revisions of a file

- **Method:** `update`
  - **Endpoint:** `PATCH /drive/v3/files/{fileId}/revisions/{revisionId}`
  - **Description:** Updates a revision with patch semantics
